description_long: This is a rectangular, two-story house with a dark gable roof and a single brick chimney. The exterior walls are clad in a reddish-brown brick pattern, giving it a classic, sturdy appearance. The front facade features four symmetrically arranged windows with white trim and a single wooden door on the lower right. The side views reveal the house's narrow depth and the continuation of the brick pattern, with one side showing a single vertically aligned window. The roof is steeply pitched and uniformly black, with the chimney positioned near one end. The overall design is simple and functional, reminiscent of traditional Colonial-style homes commonly found in urban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story brick house with a black gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a single chimney, featuring a classic and simple design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four windows with white trim and a wooden door, all set in a brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow depth of the house, the brick wall, and the chimney extending from the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with four symmetrically arranged windows and no visible door, maintaining the brick exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single vertically aligned window and the chimney visible on the roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch or overhang, located at the lower right of the front facade.
